title: Snapchat launches AI clips format in Lens Studio - Music Ally
text:
Snapchat has announced its launch of AI Clips in Lens Studio, which creators can use to design and publish AR and AI effects on Snapchat.
AI Clips are a new AI-powered lens format – something that Snapchat says is like nothing else on the market right now. With Clips, Lens creators design a Lens, which the user can use to transform a single photo of their choosing into a
five-second video
– removing the need for any external tools.
Given how massive Lenses are on Snapchat, we’re curious to see how music teams will be leveraging this new format in the future.
Level up on Snapchat.
Experiment with Lens.
Custom Snapchat Lenses used to cost a pretty penny, but now anyone can try it. If your artist’s audience is on Snapchat, give it a go.
Try Lens for a release.
Start by thinking of a simple theme that connects to the artist’s song. If it’s a summer song – how can you immerse Snapchatters in ‘vacation vibes’?
Marlen Hüllbrock
Director of Marketing & Strategy
Music Ally's Director of Marketing & Strategy
